panels.title: Healthy Volumes
panels.description: Volumes currently reporting healthy robustness.

panels.title: Degraded Volumes
panels.description: Volumes with reduced replica redundancy.

panels.title: Faulted Volumes
panels.description: Faulted volumes that may be inaccessible.

panels.title: Read-only Filesystems
panels.description: Mounted Longhorn filesystems detected as read-only.

panels.title: Ready Longhorn Nodes
panels.description: Longhorn nodes reporting Ready=true.

panels.title: Critical Alerts
panels.description: Currently firing critical Longhorn Health Monitor alerts.

panels.title: Volume Robustness by State
panels.description: Number of volumes in each active robustness state.

panels.title: Affected Volumes
panels.description: Volumes currently degraded, faulted, or unknown.

panels.title: Actual Volume Size / Configured Capacity
panels.description: Longhorn allocated size divided by configured volume capacity.

targets.expr: max by (volume, pvc_namespace, pvc) (longhorn_volume_actual_size_bytes{volume=~"$volume"}) / max by (volume, pvc_namespace, pvc) (longhorn_volume_capacity_bytes{volume=~"$volume"})

panels.title: Volume Actual Size
panels.description: Actual allocated size of each Longhorn volume.

panels.title: Read / Write Throughput
panels.description: Per-volume throughput rates.

panels.title: Read / Write IOPS
panels.description: Per-volume read and write operations per second.

panels.title: Read / Write Latency
panels.description: Average latency derived from Longhorn cumulative latency and IOPS counters.

panels.title: Longhorn Nodes Not Ready
panels.description: Longhorn nodes whose ready condition is false.

panels.title: Longhorn Disks Not Ready
panels.description: Longhorn disks whose ready condition is false.

panels.title: Disk Used + Reserved Capacity
panels.description: Percentage of disk capacity consumed or reserved by Longhorn.

targets.expr: max by (node, disk) (longhorn_disk_usage_bytes{node=~"$node",disk=~"$disk"} + longhorn_disk_reservation_bytes{node=~"$node",disk=~"$disk"}) / max by (node, disk) (longhorn_disk_capacity_bytes{node=~"$node",disk=~"$disk"})

panels.title: Disk Capacity Breakdown
panels.description: Capacity, usage, and configured reservation by Longhorn disk.

panels.title: Replica Errors and Unknown States
panels.description: Requires Longhorn versions that expose longhorn_replica_state.

panels.title: Engine Errors and Unknown States
panels.description: Requires Longhorn versions that expose longhorn_engine_state.

panels.title: Replica Rebuild Progress
panels.description: Replica rebuild progress. Metric availability depends on Longhorn version.

panels.title: Engine Replica Modes
panels.description: Replicas reported by engines in error or write-only mode.

panels.title: Longhorn Manager CPU
panels.description: CPU usage reported by Longhorn Manager.

panels.title: Longhorn Manager Memory
panels.description: Memory usage reported by Longhorn Manager.

panels.title: Firing Longhorn Health Alerts
panels.description: Alerts from the Longhorn Health Monitor. Backup alerts are intentionally excluded by project scope.
